_comment: Copy this file to .agenthood/config.json and remove all _comment fields.
_comment_runtime: Your AI coding assistant. One of: claude-code | copilot | gemini-cli | other
_comment_members: Which Society members to activate. Skills are installed into the runtime's skills directory.
_comment_hooks: Path where git hooks are installed. Use .husky for Husky-managed projects, .githooks for bare git hook directories.
_comment_conventions: Paths to the commit template and commitlint config files in your project root.
_comment_provider: Optional: preferred LLM provider and model. Members use this when they can select their own model.
_comment_providers: Optional: Ordered list of LLM providers for failover. First = primary, subsequent = fallbacks. Each provider can specify fallback models for model downgrade on failure.

providers.name: ollama
providers._comment: No API key needed for local Ollama

_comment_failover: Optional: Circuit breaker and probe recovery settings.
_comment_qualityGates: Optional: configure which quality gates are enabled. Each gate can be enabled or disabled independently.
_comment_permissions: Optional: permission profile for automated member actions. conservative = read-only; standard = read + safe writes; elevated = full write access.

permissions._comment_overrides: Per-member overrides. Key is member name, value is one of: conservative | standard | elevated

_comment_toolScoping: Optional: restrict which MCP tools each member can call. Omit to allow all available tools.

toolScoping._comment_example: Each key is a member name. Value is a list of allowed tool name patterns (supports * wildcard).
